title: Proclamation No. 2198, s. 1982
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 2198

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 121 DATED NOVEMBER 25, 1966, ESTABLISHING AS MT. MACOLOD FOREST RESERVES FOR WOOD PRODUCTION, WATERSHED; SOIL PROTECTION AND OTHER FOREST USES PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3092 AND RESERVING AS AN AGRICULTURAL COLONY AND DECLARING AS AN ALIENABLE OR DISPOSABLE LAND CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SILAGO, PROVINCE OF SOUTHERN LEYTE, ISLAND OF LEYTE.

Upon the recommendation of the Director of Forest Development, concurred in by the Minister of Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of Section 85 of Commonwealth Act No. 141, as amended, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 121, dated November 25, 1966, which established as Mt. Macolod Forest Reserves for wood production, watershed, soil protection and other forest uses pursuant to Republic Act No. 3092, and do hereby reserve as agricultural colony and declare as alienable or disposable land, subject to private rights if any there be, and to final classification and survey, as well as to the conditions that the timber and other forest products found therein shall remain under the administrative control of the Bureau of Forest Development in accordance with the forest laws and regulations, certain parcels of land of the public domain containing an aggregate area of 1,252 hectares, more or less, situated in the municipality of Silago, Province of Southern Leyte, Island of Leyte, which parcels are more particularly described as follows:

Parcel I

Beginning from corner I which is S 73º 00 E, 1,205 meters from the junction of Hinagimitan Dacu Creek and Higasaon River, being 88º E, 180 meters to corner 2; thence, S 50º E, 160 meters to corner 3; thence, N 81º E, 160 meters to corner 4; thence, N 40º E, 260 meters to corner 5; thence, N 79º E, 160 meters to corner 6; thence, S 35º E, 140 meters to corner 7; thence, S 08º W, 140 meters to corner 8; thence, S 32º W, 130 meters to corner 9; thence, S 06º E, 110 meters to corner 10; thence, S 49º E, 200 meters to corner 11; thence, S 15º E, 360 meters to corner 12; thence, S 44º W, 660 meters to corner 13; thence, N 51º W, 190 meters to corner 19; thence, S 83º W, 120 meters to corner 20; thence, S 51º W, 240 meters to corner 21; thence, Due South 310 meters to corner 22; thence, S 69º E, 160 meters to corner 23; thence, N 60º E, 240 meters to corner 24; thence, S 40º E, 210 meters to corner 25; thence, S 49º E, 250 meters to corner 26; thence, S 49º E, 200 meters to corner 27; thence, S 61º W, 90 meters to corner 28; thence, S 65º E, 250 meters to corner 29; thence, Due East 140 meters to corner 30; thence, S 12º E, 370 meters to corner 31; thence, S 88º E, 220 meters to corner 32; thence Following Lanan Creek upstream general SE direction about 390 meters to corner 33; thence, S 53º W, 140 meters to corner 34; thence, S 77º W, 170 meters to corner 35; thence, N 50º W, 200 meters to corner 36; thence, N 55º W, 230 meters to corner 37; thence, N 42º W, 260 meters to corner 38; thence, S 66º W, 120 meters to corner 39; thence, S 08º W, 230 meters to corner 40; thence, S 74º W, 220 meters to corner 41; thence, N 52º W, 260 meters to corner 42; thence, N 45º E, 280 meters to corner 43; thence, S 72º E, 190 meters to corner 111; thence, N 52º E, 150 meters to corner 1; The point of beginning, containing an area of six hundred ninety-six (696) hectares.

Parcel II

Beginning from corner I, a tangile tree, 60 cms. in diameter, which is identical to corner 119, Block I, Alienable or Disposable, Project No. 49, Silago, Leyte, being S 74º E, about 360 meters to corner 2;

thence, N 36º E, 300 meters to corner 3; thence, N 32º E, 300 meters to corner 4; thence, S 65º E, 300 meters to corner 5; thence, S 45º E, 360 meters to corner 6; thence, S 17º E, 330 meters to corner 7; thence, S 17º E, 270 meters to corner 8; thence, S 55º E, 350 meters to corner 9; thence, S 48º E, 270 meters to corner 10; thence, S 48º E,  270 meters to corner 11; thence, S 53º E, 200 meters to corner 12; thence, S 48º W, 200 meters to corner 13; thence, S 33º W, 230 meters to corner 14; thence, S 27º E, 140 meters to corner 15; thence, S 35º W, 270 meters to corner 16; thence, S 31º W, 300 meters to corner 17; thence, S 24º W, 200 meters to corner 18; thence, Due East 170 meters to corner 19; thence, S 74º E, 180 meters to corner 20; thence, S 18º E, 160 meters to corner 21; thence, S 11º W, 230 meters to corner 22; thence, S 31º W, 260 meters to corner 23; thence, S 67º E, 200 meters to corner 24; thence, S 60º E, 180 meters to corner 25; thence, S 49º E, 200 meters to corner 26; thence, S 43º E, 240 meters to corner 27; thence, S 28º E, 200 meters to corner 28; thence, S 48º E, 200 meters to corner 29; thence, S 12º W, 320 meters to corner 30; thence, S 26º W, 280 meters to corner 31; thence, Due West 120 meters to corner 32; thence, N 12º W, 290 meters to corner 33; thence, N 86º W, 350 meters to corner 34; thence, N 55º W, 300 meters to corner 35; thence, S 73º W, 300 meters to corner 36; thence, N 19º E, 310 meters to corner 37; thence, N 31º W, 290 meters to corner 38; thence, N 64º W, 200 meters to corner 39; thence, S 82º W, 350 meters to corner 40; thence, N 31º W, 350 meters to corner 41; thence, N 04º E, 270 meters to corner 42; thence, N 80º W, 270 meters to corner 43; thence, S 57º W, 300 meters to corner 44; thence, N 83º W, 180 meters to corner 45; thence, N 30º E, 350 meters to corner 46; thence, N 68º E, 290 meters to corner 47; thence, N 10º W, 370 meters to corner 48; thence, N 02º E, 320 meters to corner 49; thence, N 19º W, 280 meters to corner 50; thence, S 56º W, 270 meters to corner 51; thence, S 52º W, 370 meters to corner 52; thence, N 49º W, 160 meters to corner 53; thence, N 29º W, 180 meters to corner 54; thence, N 28º E, 260 meters to corner 55; thence, N 02º E, 250 meters to corner 56; thence, N 49º W, 230 meters to corner 57; thence, N 16º E, 450 meters to corner 58; thence, N 04º E, 260 meters to corner 1; The point of beginning, containing an area of five hundred forty-four (544) hectares.

Parcel III

Beginning from corner I, a monpong tree, 30 cms. in diameter, which is identical to corner 87 of Block I, Alienable or Disposable, Project No. 49 of Silago, Leyte, being N 72º E, about 290 meters to corner 2;

thence, N 86º E, 220 meters to corner 3; thence, S 73º E, 120 meters to corner 4; thence, S 42º W, 170 meters to corner 5; thence, S 06º W, 170 meters to corner 6; thence, S 07º W, 90 meters to corner 7; thence, N 51º W, 90 meters to corner 8; thence, N 45º W, 160 meters to corner 9; thence, N 67º W, 280 meters to corner 1; The point of beginning, containing an area of twelve (12) hectares

There are excluded from the operation of this proclamation a strip of 15 meters in width on each side of any public trail therein used as outlet for timber and other forest products, and a strip of 20 meters in width from the highest bank on each side of any stream for stream bank protection.

Any existing lease, licenses, permit or any other concession granted by the Bureau of Forest Development by any other office covering the area embraced by this proclamation or portions thereof is hereby terminated.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and Eighty-two.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN T. VENUS, JR. Deputy Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
